transit.description: Navigation and transportation: subway, bus, rideshare, driving, walking routes.

shopping.description: Commerce: comparing, purchasing, returning, refunds, price tracking.

accounts.description: Identity and access: creating accounts, 2FA, password recovery, account deletion.

finance.description: Money: bank accounts, paying bills, disputing charges, taxes.

government.description: Civic services: ID renewal, visa forms, DMV, registrations.

healthcare.description: Health access: appointments, insurance claims, prescriptions.

housing.description: Home logistics: renting, utilities, repairs, moving.

travel.description: Trips: booking flights, check-in, customs, hotels.

communication.description: Correspondence and coordination: packages, meetings, complaints.

digital.description: Computer and app tasks: installing software, exporting data, unsubscribing, backups.

daily.description: Common-sense everyday procedures every human knows and no corpus writes down.

subdomains.self-care: Personal routines: brush teeth, wash hands, tie shoelaces, get ready for bed.
subdomains.food: Everyday food handling: boil water, make tea, store leftovers, use a microwave.
subdomains.home: Basic home upkeep: change a lightbulb, unclog a drain, sort recycling.
subdomains.social: Everyday social scripts: order at a restaurant, pay at a cashier, wait in line, answer a call.
subdomains.errands: Out-of-home basics: mail a letter, use an ATM, refuel a car, use a vending machine.

embodied.description: Robot-executable procedures with object, affordance, and workspace annotations.

subdomains.kitchen: Kitchen manipulation: make coffee, load dishwasher, set a table, store groceries.
subdomains.household: Household chores: fold laundry, tidy a room, water plants, take out trash.
subdomains.mobility: Navigation in human spaces: open doors, use an elevator, cross a street, deliver items.
subdomains.care: Assistive routines: fetch items, medication reminders. Safety-critical; human review required.
